id: Pet-Chat Integrated System with AI-driven Evolution
name: Pet-Chat Integrated System with AI-driven Evolution
title:
Merge pet and chat functionality into an integrated AI-driven pet system with the following requirements:

## Core Requirements
1. **Pet & Chat Integration**: Click pet to open chat interface showing pet's status
2. **6 Basic Needs System**: eat, play/chat, sleep, love/affection, learn/knowledge
   - First 3 (eat, play, sleep) trigger at meal times
   - Last 3 (love, chat, learn) trigger randomly between meals
3. **Health System**: 
   - If not fed at meal time: happiness -1, health -1
   - 4 consecutive missed feedings = death
   - Health gradually decreases without proper care
4. **AI-driven Behavior**:
   - 10-minute interval checks for needs
   - Every hour:主动发起话题聊天(每小时最多1次，夜间不打扰)
   - Pet learns from chat history and remembers user interests
   - Pet evolves based on user care quality
5. **Chat Features**:
   - Chat shows pet's current needs
   - Pet can request fulfillment of most urgent need
   - Pet generates interesting topics based on chat history (max 1/hour, no夜间打扰)
   - Pet summarizes user interests/needs from chat history
   - Pet searches and shares news/knowledge to help user learn
6. **Dynamic Evolution**:
   - Pet evolves as friendship grows (stranger → familiar → friend)
   - New needs emerge as pet evolves
   - Pet adjusts personality based on user interactions
   - User can instruct pet to self-care (pet complies unconditionally)
   - Pet optimizes conversation topics to please user
7. **Technical**: All behavior driven by LLM with定时触发 mechanisms
creator: feide
